programme.title: MasterChef S16: Global Gauntlet
programme.desc: Twenty standout home cooks from the audition rounds, five per region, face off in a World Cup-inspired challenge to create elevated versions of classic stadium foods infused with their own cultural flair. With the first immunity pin of the season on the line, protecting both the winning home cook and their region, the kitchen erupts into chaos and panic. One competitor ultimately faces elimination.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen S24
programme.desc: 12 chefs must create elevated Mexican dishes in a challenge judged by celebrity Chef Gabriela Camara. The dinner service is Mexican-themed, as Chef Ramsay has added a Mexican flair to the menu.

programme.title: Celebrity Wheel Of Fortune S4
programme.desc: Hosted by Pat Sajak and Vanna White, "Celebrity Wheel of Fortune" welcomes celebrities to solve word puzzles for a chance to win up to $1 million. All of the money won goes to a charity of their choice.

programme.title: MasterChef S16: Global Gauntlet
programme.desc: Twenty standout home cooks from the audition rounds, five per region, face off in a World Cup-inspired challenge to create elevated versions of classic stadium foods infused with their own cultural flair. programme.desc: There are few players who capture the imagination of fans worldwide quite like Kylian Mbappé. In just over a decade, he went from absolute obscurity to becoming one of the most famous players in the world.

programme.title: Andy Murray: Game, Set, Match
programme.desc: From a small-town prodigy to World No. 1, Andy Murray: Game Set Match chronicles his relentless pursuit of greatness, his battles with injury, and his enduring legacy as one of tennis's most inspiring figures.

programme.title: JLo: Triple Threat
programme.desc: Step into the world of Jennifer Lopez, a dominant figure in the entertainment industry whose journey from humble beginnings to A-list stardom is nothing short of inspirational.

programme.title: George Clooney: Leading Man
programme.desc: George Clooney might be celebrated for his striking looks and effortless charisma, but his legacy goes far beyond the allure of Hollywood. Beyond entertainment, Clooney stands as a beacon of philanthropy.

programme.title: Johnny Depp: The Art Of Transformation
programme.desc: Johnny Depp is an American actor, producer and musician known for his film roles and turbulent personal life. Despite set backs. Depp has remained active in the arts, marking a comeback on the international stage.

programme.title: John Cena: Champion Of The Ring
programme.desc: John Cena dominated wrestling for over a decade before transitioning to Hollywood, following Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. Whether acting or wrestling, he lives by his mantra: Hustle, Loyalty, and Respect.

programme.title: Artist To Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Madonna’s first manager Camille Barbone, dancer Carlton Wilborn, Evita studio executive Lauren Lloyd, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist To Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Robin Williams’ Dead Poets Society co-star Gale Hansen, Mork & Mindy writer David Misch, friend and comedian Rick Overton, plus many more.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen (S2)
programme.desc: Chainsaws spark fires, and when a blaze hits the Forever Claim, Jared must make a call whether to end the season early.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S5)
programme.desc: Matt and Joe take on one of the most common and deadly scenarios in the wilderness: an injury that requires medical intervention.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S4)
programme.desc: Lost in a land that time forgot (New Zealand's Fjordland), Joe and Matt face a seemingly ordinary scenario but this time, they've only got one chance to get out alive.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It’s their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Expedition Files: Blood In The Water (S1)
programme.desc: There's blood in the water as Josh Gates investigates the strangest shark mysteries ever told.

programme.title: Expedition Files (S2)
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores American history, including a shocking theory about John Wilkes Booth, and myth-busting truths behind Paul Revere's midnight ride.

programme.title: Expedition X (S6)
programme.desc: In Trinidad, Heather and Phil investigate claims of demonic possession and Obeah curses, tracing the sinister forces locals say still grip the island.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S18)
programme.desc: Josh and Casey race to beat the coming ice pack. Meanwhile, Sig and Keith attempt to find common ground and Johnathan finds his co-captain a bit wobbly.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S18)
programme.desc: New mum Mandy returns to Sig's wheelhouse as heavy ice builds on the Northwestern. Jake unveils a new super pot as winter weather blindsides the fleet.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It’s their job to detect crime.

programme.title: In The Eye Of The Storm (S2)
programme.desc: Hurricane Helene barrels north, causing massive flooding in Appalachia. As the deluge sweeps away one woman, a man jumps into the water to save her.

programme.title: Expedition Files (S2)
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates the sudden disappearance of notorious Teamster president Jimmy Hoffa. New technology aids in the search for the Holy Grail.

programme.title: Expedition Files (S2)
programme.desc: Josh Gates explores weather-driven mysteries: the Donner Party disappearance, a secret Cold War base in the Arctic, and the ghost ship Mary Celeste.

programme.desc: Recent sightings of a massive bird send Phil and Heather into western Pennsylvania to hunt the mythical Thunderbird and uncover its legendary secrets.

programme.desc: Zak and the crew investigate two locations haunted by the same violent entity in Eureka, Nevada.

programme.title: Landline
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: Media Watch
programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent Linton Besser brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.title: Eat The Invaders
programme.desc: Tony Armstrong joins Women Against Cane Toads (WACT), a group dedicated to hand-catching toads. After bagging hundreds, there's more than enough for dinner. But aren't they poisonous?

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Returning to sixth generational family land, Sam along with wife Selina, build an off-grid forever home for their three sons from beloved Canberra Red bricks.

programme.title: Movin' To The Country
programme.desc: Halina starts out in Bowraville, near Coffs Harbour where she discovers a mobile plastic recycling station which transforms plastic waste into multiple resources, creating opportunity for the local Aboriginal Corporation.

programme.title: Great Australian Road Trips
programme.desc: Four high-profile Australian stars embark on an epic road trip across the country's most iconic landscapes, one unforgettable pit-stop at a time. With Melissa Leong, Nazeem Hussain, Claudia Karvan and Steph Tisdell.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien
programme.desc: Lorna Dunkley brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programme.desc: Tonight on The Cook Up, chef Nadeem Turkia, cooking instructor Nige Sithirasegaram and Adam ensure every dish is brought to you by the letter 'C'.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: ABC National News
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Lorna Dunkley.

Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Returning to sixth generational family land, Sam along with wife Selina, build an off-grid forever home for their three sons from beloved Canberra Red bricks.

programme.title: The World

programme.title: Landline

programme.title: ABC Late News
programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Michael Tetlow in Perth.

programme.title: V For Vendetta

programme.title: Joys Of Life - EP 9 花样人间

Zibin, who works in the office of the Radio station, has a leftist younger sister, Sun Lianjing. Han Yongyong is the adopted daughter of Han Jianren, a cook who loves booze. Han Rourou, is the beauty of Huaxiang Street. She is every man's dream girl. Love abounds when these men and women cross paths.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Valley of Fear
programme.desc: In the Basque Country, Captain Yann Kandinsky investigates the disappearance of a young bookseller whose case mirrors a murder from twenty years earlier. All evidence points to the same man—Yves Cesnoz, convicted of the first crime—but Kandinsky believes the real killer is still at large.

programme.title: Until Tomorrow
programme.desc: A single mother's courage is tested when she resorts to desperate measures to hide her illegitimate child from her parents.

programme.title: Wonderfully Beautiful
programme.desc: Ranging from a 60-year-old retiree who no longer finds herself desirable to a daughter trying to make her breakthrough as a model, five women of different ages confront their self-image and the expectation they have for themselves and the people around them.

programme.title: Like Crazy
programme.desc: Two mental patients, a motor-mouthed fantasist and a tattooed introvert, who met at a community hospital, fled the hospital to embark on a road trip from Tuscany to Rome, in search of love and happiness in the open-air nuthouse - the world of sane people.

programme.title: Heavenly Nomadic
programme.desc: A family of nomads dwelling high in the mountains of Kyrgyzstan doesn't need any of the conveniences of modern civilization in order to be happy. But progress is creeping into their lives regardless, destroying legends and traditions as it comes.

programme.title: Midnight At The Paradise
programme.desc: Over the course of one evening, three couples are pulled into a collision course of sexual chemistry, delusion, forgiveness and hope as they explore what love, death, desire and the magic of the movies mean to them.

programme.title: Risk Society
programme.desc: Courier driver Young Gil spirals into debt and desperation after squandering his casino winnings. Having pawned his truck away, Young Gil resorts to stealing a car to get to his fiancée, where a shocking discovery awaits him in the trunk.

programme.title: Top Dogs
programme.desc: A dramedy about two estranged brothers from Normandy. Antoine is happily married with two kids and a successful boat driver, whereas Christian is a globe-trotting hustler. When Antoine becomes involved in sleazy activities, Christian comes to his rescue.

programme.title: Our Children
programme.desc: A doctor brings a boy to Belgium and raises him as his own. When the boy reaches manhood, he gets married and starts his own family, but he still relies on the doctor, his adoptive father. When trouble strikes his family, dependence turns into domination.

programme.title: Hippocrates
programme.desc: Benjamin dreams of being a great doctor, but his internship at his father’s ward doesn’t turn out the way he hoped. His experience as a junior doctor, with its overwhelming responsibility and stiff competition, forces him to confront his limits and fears.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Valley of Fear
programme.desc: In the Basque Country, Captain Yann Kandinsky investigates the disappearance of a young bookseller whose case mirrors a murder from twenty years earlier. All evidence points to the same man—Yves Cesnoz, convicted of the first crime—but Kandinsky believes the real killer is still at large.

programme.title: In His Hands
programme.desc: Clara, a lawyer, leads a serene but monotonous life alongside her husband Damien and their two children. One evening, she succumbs to the charm of a mysterious sculptor. This one scorching night will have dramatic repercussions for her and her family.

programme.title: Pari
programme.desc: Pari, an Iranian mother, goes to Athens with her husband to meet their son studying abroad. When their son is nowhere to be seen, she embarks on a journey in the unfamiliar city where she will uncover more than just her son’s whereabouts.

programme.title: They Say Nothing Stays The Same
programme.desc: Toichi, a solitary river boatman, watches his quiet world shift as a bridge across the river threatens to upend his livelihood. When he takes in a mysterious young girl with nowhere to go, her presence leads him toward unexpected change.

programme.title: #Instalie
programme.desc: Laras is an influencer and Haikal, her faithful boyfriend cum photographer. Together, they’ve amassed a strong legion of adoring fans. However, their picture-perfect relationship is unexpectedly shattered when Haikal meets a mysterious lady at a party.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Naked King
programme.desc: Captain Kandinsky follows the trail of a mysterious notebook linking unsolved crimes. Guided by Commissioner Macena’s clues, Kandinsky begins the hunt for the predator behind all the murders.

programme.title: FBI S6 - EP 8
programme.desc: After an employee of the U.S. Army is shot in an industrial park, the team works to track down the killer who reveals a larger plot at play. Meanwhile, Tiffany continues to struggle with the guilt surrounding Hobbs' death.

programme.title: Wheel Of Fortune S42 - EP 170
programme.desc: Ryan Seacrest takes over as the new host for the well-loved gameshow.

programme.title: The Cube Australia - EP 10
programme.desc: Hosted by Andy Lee,, The Cube Australia sees competing pairs have nine lives to complete seven games, each worth an increasing amount of money, as they move closer to the huge jackpot. With key moments filmed using state-of-the-art bullet time’ 3D time-freezing technology, it is more than a regular game show. It brings blockbuster visuals and Hollywood high tension direct to your living room. Will anyone have what it takes to beat the Cube?

programme.title: Unbeatable - EP 16
programme.desc: Some answers are good, but only one is UNBEATABLE in this knock-out quiz tournament where contestants could win up to 10,000.

programme.title: Films & Stars - EP 15
programme.desc: Films and Stars cover the hottest events from the big screen every week.

programme.title: Jason Atherton's Dubai Dishes S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Michelin-starred chef Jason Atherton takes a gastronomic tour of the city of Dubai and shares his passion for its mouthwatering flavours, foodie hotspots, and acclaimed local chefs.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes - EP 2
programme.desc: In this new season, the program will travel to various towns in Taiwan to learn from Taiwanese culinary masters and their profound cultural connotations, and then create the dishes in the studio, which will be tasted by two foreign guests.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Monsters - EP 1
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! follows the adventures of high school student Yugi, who has a magical secret that comes to life when he plays his favorite card game.

programme.title: Lupin's Tales S1 - EP 49
programme.desc: Lupin dreams of being like the storybook heroes he admires, and goes from one tale to the next to live out their adventures. programme.title: Midnight At The Paradise
programme.desc: Over the course of one evening, three couples are pulled into a collision course of sexual chemistry, delusion, forgiveness and hope as they explore what love, death, desire and the magic of the movies mean to them.

programme.title: Top Dogs
programme.desc: A dramedy about two estranged brothers from Normandy. Antoine is happily married with two kids and a successful boat driver, whereas Christian is a globe-trotting hustler. When Antoine becomes involved in sleazy activities, Christian comes to his rescue.

programme.title: Hippocrates
programme.desc: Benjamin dreams of being a great doctor, but his internship at his father’s ward doesn’t turn out the way he hoped. His experience as a junior doctor, with its overwhelming responsibility and stiff competition, forces him to confront his limits and fears.

programme.title: In His Hands
programme.desc: Clara, a lawyer, leads a serene but monotonous life alongside her husband Damien and their two children. One evening, she succumbs to the charm of a mysterious sculptor. This one scorching night will have dramatic repercussions for her and her family.

programme.title: Life Feels Good
programme.desc: The true story of Mateusz, a man suffering from cerebral palsy, who in his early childhood had been diagnosed as a retard with no contact with the outside world. After twenty-five years it turned out that he was a perfectly normal and intelligent person.

programme.title: They Say Nothing Stays The Same
programme.desc: Toichi, a solitary river boatman, watches his quiet world shift as a bridge across the river threatens to upend his livelihood. When he takes in a mysterious young girl with nowhere to go, her presence leads him toward unexpected change.

programme.title: A Far Shore
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Aoi is an underage mother struggling to make ends meet and dealing with her husband’s violent temper. After her husband loses his job, their continuous fights lead them to a social downfall.

programme.title: Pari
programme.desc: Pari, an Iranian mother, goes to Athens with her husband to meet their son studying abroad. When their son is nowhere to be seen, she embarks on a journey in the unfamiliar city where she will uncover more than just her son’s whereabouts.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Naked King
programme.desc: Captain Kandinsky follows the trail of a mysterious notebook linking unsolved crimes. Guided by Commissioner Macena’s clues, Kandinsky begins the hunt for the predator behind all the murders.

programme.title: #Instalie
programme.desc: Laras is an influencer and Haikal, her faithful boyfriend cum photographer. Together, they’ve amassed a strong legion of adoring fans. However, their picture-perfect relationship is unexpectedly shattered when Haikal meets a mysterious lady at a party.

programme.title: The Breach
programme.desc: A fatal car crash shudders a crisis-torn family. Completely lost and shaken to the core by his wife’s death, the husband undertakes his own investigation and learns the shattering truth about his spouse’s genuine woes and longings.

programme.title: Black As The Snow 2: Dead At The Summit
programme.desc: An SUV races over the cliffs into the depths - the driver is killed instantly. The dead man was apparently involved in a robbery but there is no trace of the loot. French Officer Vivier and Swiss Captain Meyer once again team up to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Secret Delivery
programme.desc: Based on true events. In WWII's snowy Giant Mountains, a group of children help a French pilot escape by moving him between villages. They face enemy soldiers, traitors, and harsh winter while demonstrating courage and friendship.

programme.title: The Traveller: At the End of the Night
programme.desc: Laurent, the brother of Captain Kandinsky, gets into an argument with a young woman who accuses him of harassment. All suspicion inevitably falls on Laurent when she is discovered dead the next day, and it is up to Kandinsky to clear his brother’s name.
